overall.description: A static cinematic shot of a futuristic cyberpunk cityscape viewed from across a body of water. The scene features dense industrial architecture with towering skyscrapers, smokestacks emitting steam, and a cluttered waterfront with makeshift structures. This is high-quality game engine footage, likely from Cyberpunk 2077, with no camera movement and clear sunny weather.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial waterfront with floating shacks overlooking cyberpunk city skyline

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the cityscape from a fixed vantage point across the water

entered.detail: large red metal bridge structure with industrial piping spanning the left side
multiple tall industrial smokestacks emitting white steam into the sky
cluster of makeshift floating structures with colorful roofs along the shoreline
dense cluster of futuristic high-rise buildings with reflective glass facades
raised transport infrastructure running horizontally across the middle distance

segments.scene_description: A static panoramic view of a futuristic cyberpunk city waterfront. The camera remains fixed, capturing industrial smokestacks releasing steam, a red bridge structure on the left, and makeshift floating shacks on the right shore. The distant skyline features towering glass and metal skyscrapers under a clear blue sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, wide-angle panoramic view of a futuristic cyberpunk waterfront that maintains a consistent, sprawling industrial atmosphere. It begins by capturing the dense interplay between the towering glass skyscrapers of the distant skyline and the gritty reality of the foreground. As the eye moves across the frame, the scene emphasizes the contrast between the red bridge structure on the left and the makeshift floating shacks clustered on the right shore. The composition remains fixed, allowing the steady release of steam from industrial smokestacks to drift under a clear blue sky.
